final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a photorealistic close-up lifestyle photo in Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) product-sharing style.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu mom-sharing aesthetic, photorealistic, natural handheld-feel snapshot, warm and genuine
Composition:
  3:4 vertical
  medium close-up shot, subject fills the frame
  boy standing sideways in front of a full-length mirror in a children's room
  one hand lightly tugging the waistband of the swimsuit, demonstrating relaxed fit
  mirror reflection visible, showing front and back simultaneously
  swimsuit details clearly visible: shoulder seams, side camouflage panel splice, and inseam length
Subject:
  same chubby little boy as in the reference image
  wearing a royal-blue camouflage-splice two-piece swimsuit (rash guard top + swim shorts)
  posture relaxed and natural, slight side-on stance
  waistband sits comfortably without digging in, no bunching at the crotch, fabric hugs without constricting
Scene/backdrop: clean, tidy children's bedroom; full-length mirror as key prop; minimal background clutter
Lighting/mood:
  soft, natural indoor daylight
  no harsh shadows
  warm and authentic, matching a real parent's casual home photo
Color palette: royal blue as dominant color, camouflage splice panel in coordinating tones, neutral room background
Materials/textures:
  swimsuit fabric appears stretchy and smooth with visible texture
  camouflage print on side panels rendered in detail
Text (verbatim):
Constraints:
  no Chinese text anywhere in the image
  preserve the boy's identity and body type from the reference image
  swimsuit fit must read as comfortable and non-restrictive on a chubby child's body
Avoid: stiff or posed studio look, overly saturated colors, visible brand logos, any text or watermarks
